mapper.select:
SELECT o.id, o.order_no, o.price, o.status, o.expire_time, o.create_time, o.product_id, p.title AS product_title, JSON_EXTRACT(p.images, '$[0]') AS product_cover_image,
o.seller_id AS other_user_id, u.nick_name AS other_user_nick_name, u.avatar_url AS other_user_avatar
o.buyer_id AS other_user_id, u.nick_name AS other_user_nick_name, u.avatar_url AS other_user_avatar
FROM trade_order o LEFT JOIN product p ON o.product_id = p.id
LEFT JOIN user u ON o.seller_id = u.id
LEFT JOIN user u ON o.buyer_id = u.id
o.buyer_id = #{userId} AND o.is_deleted_buyer = 0
o.seller_id = #{userId} AND o.is_deleted_seller = 0
AND o.status = #{status}
ORDER BY o.create_time DESC

SELECT o.id, o.order_no, o.price, c.name AS campus_name, o.meeting_point, o.status, o.cancel_reason, o.cancel_by, o.expire_time, o.confirm_deadline, o.complete_time, o.create_time, o.product_id, p.title AS product_title, p.description AS product_description, p.images AS product_images_json, p.status AS product_status, o.buyer_id, ub.nick_name AS buyer_nick_name, ub.avatar_url AS buyer_avatar, ub.phone AS buyer_phone, o.seller_id, us.nick_name AS seller_nick_name, us.avatar_url AS seller_avatar, us.phone AS seller_phone FROM trade_order o LEFT JOIN product p ON o.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN campus c ON o.campus_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user ub ON o.buyer_id = ub.id LEFT JOIN user us ON o.seller_id = us.id WHERE o.id = #{id}
